title: Thyella acrocephala
taxonomy: Thyella acrocephala is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Trochidae. The genus Thyella is part of the superfamily Trochoidea, a group of small to medium-sized sea snails. Thyella acrocephala is a species within the genus, classified based on its unique shell characteristics. The classification of Thyella acrocephala is significant in understanding the evolutionary relationships within the Trochidae family.
uses: Thyella acrocephala is a plant species found in Australia, but information on its medicinal uses is limited. parts: Thyella acrocephala is a species of flowering plant, but information on its medicinal parts is not readily available.
